case_title: SALINAS, JESSICA S. VS DU, QUIZHAO

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DU, QUIZHAO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,378.00 FILED BY SALINAS, JESSICA S. AS TO DEFENDANT DU, QUIZHAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DU, QUIZHAO
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-10-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-24-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALINAS, JESSICA S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DU, QUIZHAO $1,103.12 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,155.12, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1378.90, AND ATTRIBUTES 80% FAULT TO DEFENDANT DU, AND 20% TO THE THIRD PARTY DRIVER DIZOA. THE JUDGEMENT REPRESENTS THE PROPORTIONATE SHARE ATTRIBUTABLE TO DEFENDANT DU. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
